message:
Harden service worker error handling and browser compat guards

sw-register.js:
- Catch unhandled rejections from applyUpdate() in refresh button handler
- Guard unregisterServiceWorker() against browsers without SW support,
  treat missing registration as successful no-op instead of falling through
- Refactor unregister logic to early-return pattern for clarity
- Guard swStatus.isRegistered and isActive getters against missing
  navigator.serviceWorker to prevent throws on unsupported browsers

sw.js:
- Hoist respond() and add rejectRequest() helper before payload validation
  so invalid/unknown messages send REQUEST_INVALID back to callers instead
  of silently dropping, which would leave RPC callers hanging until timeout
- Reject malformed payloads, missing type, and unknown message types with
  descriptive error strings

tests/pages_bundle.rs:
- Extend existing SW message handling assertions to verify rejectRequest
  calls and REQUEST_INVALID response type
- Add new test_sw_register_handles_unsupported_or_missing_registrations_safely
  covering applyUpdate catch, unregister no-op paths, and status getter guards

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
